---
# Workflow Contract — generated by /interactive-planning, consumed by /orchestrate
# Edit this file to change how phases are executed. Hot-reloaded on each phase dispatch.

project:
  name: "{{ project_name }}"
  type: greenfield            # greenfield | brownfield | prototype
  build_cmd: ""               # e.g. "swift build 2>&1 | xcbeautify", "npm run build"
  test_cmd: ""                # e.g. "swift test", "npm test"

execution:
  phase_runner: subagent      # each phase gets its own context window
  max_phase_retries: 2        # retry a failed phase this many times before surfacing to user
  continuation_prompt: true   # on retry, inject attempt number + previous result into prompt

  progress_enforcement: strict
  # strict = phase agent must update handoff.md; hook validates
  # warn   = hook logs warning if handoff not updated, doesn't block
  # none   = best-effort, no enforcement

  gates:
    between_phases: auto      # auto | manual | review
    # auto   = proceed to next phase without asking
    # manual = ask user before each phase
    # review = show diff summary, then ask
    on_failure: retry          # retry | stop | ask
    # retry = auto-retry up to max_phase_retries
    # stop  = halt orchestration on first failure
    # ask   = surface to user immediately

handoff:
  file: .claude/handoff.md    # relative to git root
  max_lines: 150              # phase agents truncate Architecture Decisions if exceeded

progress:
  file: .claude/progress-log.md  # relative to git root
  mode: append_only              # phase agents append session entries, never edit existing
---

## Phase Prompt

You are implementing phase "{{ phase.name }}" ({{ phase.number }} of {{ phase.total }}) of {{ project.name }}.

### Context

{{ phase.description }}

### Prior Phases

{% for p in completed_phases %}
- Phase {{ p.number }}: {{ p.name }} — {{ p.summary }}
{% endfor %}

### Acceptance Criteria

{% for c in phase.criteria %}
- [ ] {{ c }}
{% endfor %}

### Rules

- Work only in: {{ workspace.path }}
- Build: {{ project.build_cmd }}
- Test: {{ project.test_cmd }}
- Read `.claude/handoff.md` before starting any work
- Update `.claude/handoff.md` before ending your session
- Append your session entry to `.claude/progress-log.md` before ending

## Continuation Prompt

This is continuation attempt #{{ attempt }} for phase "{{ phase.name }}".
Previous run ended with status: {{ previous_result.status }}
Reason: {{ previous_result.error }}

Resume from current workspace state. Do not repeat completed work.
Read `.claude/handoff.md` for what was accomplished so far.
Verify workspace state matches handoff claims before proceeding.
